title: February ticket supporting slices drift from canonical summaries
description: Supporting February ticket artifacts contain narrower or manual observations that do not match the canonical per-date validation summaries.
evidence: cross_date_validation_matrix.json now treats them as supporting_noncanonical_sources.
recommended_fix: Do not use these files as canonical metric sources; either relabel them explicitly or regenerate them later from the canonical method.

title: February cash validation is not fully internalized in repo
description: One February cash slice references an external RPT_24 export path and therefore cannot be promoted to fully internal repo closure.
recommended_fix: Internalize the February export evidence or keep February cash at partial/blocked boundary.
